de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.utilities

  • java.lang.Object

extends java.lang.Object

      • paintEmptyViewComponent

        public static void paintEmptyViewComponent(javax.swing.JComponent pane,
                                           java.lang.String name)
        paints empty view with white background.

      • copyHighlightToClipboard

        public static void copyHighlightToClipboard(SequentView view,
                                            PosInSequent pos)

      • setCenter

        public static void setCenter(java.awt.Component comp)
        Center a component on the screen.
        Parameters:
        comp - the component to be centered relative to the screen. It must already have its final size set.
        See Also:
        setCenter(Component, Component)

      • setCenter

        public static void setCenter(java.awt.Component comp,
                             java.awt.Component parent)
        Center a component within a parental component.
        Parameters:
        comp - the component to be centered.
        parent - center relative to what. null to center relative to screen.
        See Also:
        setCenter(Component)
